components_created: components/ui/OptimizedImage.tsx - FastImage wrapper with skeleton loading and fade-in
components_modified: components/subscriptions/VideoCard.tsx - Now uses OptimizedImage for thumbnails

feed_loads_under_2_seconds.details: FlatList already configured with maxToRenderPerBatch=10, initialNumToRender=10, windowSize=5 for fast initial render

60fps_maintained_during_scroll.details: FlatList optimizations: removeClippedSubviews=true, maxToRenderPerBatch=10, updateCellsBatchingPeriod=50, windowSize=5, maintainVisibleContentPosition

skeleton_shows_while_images_load.details: OptimizedImage component shows Skeleton placeholder while loading, then fades in smoothly

offscreen_images_cancelled.details: removeClippedSubviews=true unmounts offscreen views, FastImage handles memory efficiently

memory_stays_under_200MB.details: FastImage aggressive caching (cacheControl.web), FlatList virtualization, removeClippedSubviews

all_cards_render_under_3_seconds.details: FeedSkeleton shows immediately, FastImage progressive loading, FlatList batching
